violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Top items in make table are not date marked (not stocked today). -Foil pan of coleslaw and small foil pan of pulled brisket in walk in cooler were not date marked. -Deli sandwiches and portioned cheesecake desserts at grab and go were not date marked.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of ROP packaging. -Commercial chopped ham and raw hamburger patties were vacuum sealed and frozen on-site.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -4 cases of single use items stored on floor in kitchen area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Several sleeves of drink cups stored disorderly/on the floor in the corner of liquor room. -Food trays at roller grill were not stored inverted to protect food contact surfaces. (COS)

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Keg coolers' drain lines do not feed into a plumbed drain. Leak/floor spill at fron of 6 handle keg cooler.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Dishwasher bulk chemicals stored on shelf with clean linens above bottled sodas in mop room. *Directed to move below food service items.--Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Blue planet (Chlorine based) chemical spray bottle had unknown chemical in bottle. *COS-Staff dumped, rinsed, and disposed of bottle while on-site.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Plastic wrapped beef tips were stored on sheet pan with chubs of hamburger.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet wiping cloth left at prep table between uses and sani bucket was not yet made/not in-use.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open bag of chopped ham in bottom of prep table is not date marked. -Container of queso and open packages of deli meat in walk in cooler were not date marked.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found at 0ppm Chlorine. *Had to prime line for several minutes. Corrected on site to 50ppm chlorine.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
